# mpls-v1alpha1_default_ldp_router_list (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `namespace` (String) the namespace scope in which to operate

### Optional

- `fields` (String) a comma-separated list of resource fields to fetch/return.  If unspecified, all fields are fetched.  If empty, only key-fields are fetched.
- `filter` (String) an EQL "where" expression that will be used to filter the set of resources returned.
- `label_selector` (String) A label selector string to filter the results based on resource labels. If specified multiple times, the union of resources which satisfy a label-selector will be returned.
- `labelselector` (String) Deprecated: a label selector string to filter the results based on CR labels

### Read-Only

- `api_version` (String)
- `items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `kind` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Optional:

- `spec` (Attributes) DefaultLDPRouterSpec defines the desired state of DefaultLDPRouter (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--spec))

Read-Only:

- `alarms` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--alarms))
- `api_version` (String)
- `deviations` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--deviations))
- `kind` (String)
- `metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--metadata))
- `status` (Attributes) DefaultLDPRouterStatus defines the observed state of DefaultLDPRouter (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--status))

<a id="nestedatt--items--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.spec`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Indicated whether the LDP Router is administratively enabled.
- `export_policies` (List of String) Reference to a Policy CR that will be used to filter label bindings advertised to peers.
- `implicit_null` (Boolean) Use implicit null label.
- `import_policies` (List of String) Reference to a Policy CR that will be used to filter label bindings received from peers.
- `keep_alive` (Attributes) LDP Session Keep-Alive parameters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--spec--keep_alive))
- `label_block_ref` (String) Reference to a LabelBlock resource for label allocation. If not specified, the label range will be auto-allocated.
- `label_withdrawal_delay_seconds` (Number) Label withdrawal delay time (in seconds).
- `lfa` (Attributes) LDP LFA (Loop-Free Alternate) functionality. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--spec--lfa))
- `link_adjacency` (Attributes) LDP Link Adjacency parameters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--spec--link_adjacency))
- `longest_prefix_match` (Boolean) Enables longest prefix match forwarding. By default, an exact match is required for FEC resolution.
- `max_ecmp` (Number) The maximum number of ECMP paths towards an LDP FEC.
- `tunnel_down_damp_time_seconds` (Number) Dampening time (in seconds) for a tunnel down event.

<a id="nestedatt--items--spec--keep_alive"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.spec.keep_alive`

Optional:

- `keep_alive_hold_time_seconds` (Number) Hold time (in seconds) for maintaining LDP session in the absence of received KeepAlives.
- `keep_alive_interval_seconds` (Number) Keep-Alive interval (in seconds) for sending LDP KeepAlive messages.


<a id="nestedatt--items--spec--lfa"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.spec.lfa`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enables LDP LFA (Loop-Free Alternate) functionality.


<a id="nestedatt--items--spec--link_adjacency"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.spec.link_adjacency`

Optional:

- `hello_hold_time_seconds` (Number) Hold time (in seconds) for maintaining LDP Link Hello adjacency in the absence of received Hellos.
- `hello_interval_seconds` (Number) Hello interval (in seconds) for sending LDP Link Hello messages.
- `transport_address` (String) Transport address selection for Link LDP sessions.



<a id="nestedatt--items--alarms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.alarms`

Read-Only:

- `critical` (Number)
- `major` (Number)
- `minor` (Number)
- `warning` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--items--deviations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.deviations`

Read-Only:

- `count` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--items--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.metadata`

Read-Only:

- `annotations` (Map of String)
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `name` (String)
- `namespace` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--items--status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.status`

Read-Only:

- `health` (Number) Indicates the health score of the LDP Router.
- `health_score_reason` (String) Indicates the reason for the health score.
- `last_change_time` (String) The time when the state of the resource last changed.
- `operational_state` (String) Operational state of the LDP Router.
